title: CSI-GEP-nf
description: Schema for the CSI-GEP Nextflow pipeline

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

input_h5ad.description: Input scRNA-seq counts matrix in .h5ad format.

dataset_name.description: Prefix used for naming final output files.

csi_gep_analysis_options.title: CSI-GEP analysis options
csi_gep_analysis_options.description: Parameters controlling the CSI-GEP model fitting and rank selection.

numgenes.description: Number of highly variable genes used for matrix factorization.

k_step.description: Step size between tested NMF ranks.

n_iter.description: Number of cNMF iterations to run for each tested rank.

check_for_rescue.description: Enable rescue of additional programs during the CSI-GEP final selection step.
